title: Gorilla Double Sided Tape 7.3m - Heavy Duty, Strong Adhesive & Indoor/Outdoor Use
features: HEAVY DUTY BOND: Gorilla Double Sided Tape is made with a strong adhesive that is thick on both sides for a heavy duty bond.
BONDS: Carpet, rugs, flooring, wood, stone, brick, metal, vinyl, plastic, paper, and more.
INDOOR / OUTDOOR USE: Gorilla Double Sided Tape is great for indoor and outdoor use.
DIRECTIONS: For best results, apply tape to clean, even surfaces at room temperature. Both surfaces should make complete contact.
NOTE: May damage surface if removed. Store in a cool, dry place. Do not use to hang heavy-duty items.
